''' Junkin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] and demolitions expert in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], and held the rank of [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]]. He supervised explosives preparations for covert operations and consulted with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Madine]] to plan placement of explosives within the [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] [[Endor shield generator bunker|control bunker]]. Part of the [[Endor strike team/Legends|Endor strike team]] led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
